comment: Catalog of apps. Every entry has a `kind`: `web` apps ship as a SHA-pinned GitHub Release zip of the built app (download/sha256) and run in-shell; `native` apps declare per-OS package-manager ids in `installers` and are installed via brew/winget/scoop/flatpak. `replaces` maps the app to the paid product(s) it is an alternative to; `metrics` carries quality/maintenance/security signals refreshed out of band. Contributors publish by PR-ing an entry here.

apps.name: Presenter
apps.description: AI presentation builder — chat edits the real code of each deck, with live preview, present mode, notes and timer.
apps.author: Albert Marimón

apps.name: GIMP
apps.description: Full-featured raster image editor — layers, masks, filters, scripting.
apps.author: The GIMP Team

apps.name: Obsidian
apps.description: Local-first markdown knowledge base with backlinks and a plugin ecosystem.
apps.author: Dynalist Inc.
